title: eucosia afzelii
intro: Eucosia afzelii, also known as Afzelia africana or African teak, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The bark, leaves, and seeds of this plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eucosia afzelii include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
